arts.ttl: Gündoğan: City lacked 'desire' of previous years
arts.sum: İlkay Gündoğan has suggested that Manchester City's struggles this season have been down to lacking "behaviours" that helped them win four Premier League titles in a row.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss provides injury news ahead of Man City clash - Two key defenders available for Premier League clash
